job_description:
# Sr Data Analyst
Company: mPulse Mobile
Source: Indeed
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: March 30, 2026
URL: https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=127ec4f2c3b2c16c

## Highlights
- Remote senior healthcare data analyst role focused on healthcare data migration from legacy systems to AWS cloud environments.
- Responsibilities include data discovery, profiling, gap analysis, source-to-target mapping, transformation rules, and pre/post migration validation.
- Works with clinical, claims, provider, patient, billing, eligibility, EHR/EMR, and payer data.
- Requires advanced SQL, data quality rules, ETL/ELT validation, dashboards, documentation, and PHI/PII compliance awareness.
strengths: Excellent alignment with ETL validation, source-to-target mapping, SQL reconciliation, data quality rules, and healthcare datasets.
Remote role with claims, eligibility, provider, patient, EHR/EMR, billing, and payer-system language.
Migration validation and documentation map directly to data warehouse QA strengths.
gaps: Role asks for 10+ years, AWS cloud migration, and specific AWS services; do not overstate unsupported cloud depth.
Healthcare standards such as HL7/FHIR/ICD/CPT should be listed as exposure only if supported by the base resume.
notes: Apply first if comfortable with a senior stretch. Tailor toward SQL validation, source-to-target mapping, healthcare ETL, PHI/PII care, data quality rules, and migration reconciliation. Keep AWS as adjacent unless directly supported.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | ETL Validation | SQL Data Quality
